description:
Replace the old KYC-centered onboarding path with the launch route orchestration for Cognito, consent, intake, MDI handoff, dashboard status, and billing lockout. This ticket owns the shell, redirects, and status transitions; consent acceptance, eligibility/residency details, and questionnaire rendering are filled in by follow-on intake tickets.

**Route shape**
- `/get-started` starts or resumes onboarding.
- Authenticated product routes live under the chosen App Router grouping.
- Required steps: sign in/up, required consents, residency/eligibility, MDI-backed questionnaire, submit-to-MDI handoff, dashboard pending state, billing/payment step only at the approved point in the MDI workflow.

**Scope**
- Wire `/get-started` to redirect signed-out users through auth and signed-in users to the earliest incomplete onboarding step.
- Use a single onboarding status source in DynamoDB to drive route guards, redirects, and progress indicators.
- Create or read the minimal patient profile/status record needed for onboarding without storing clinical answers.
- Preserve no Persona/KYC step for launch.
- Keep billing/payment locked until the selected MDI approval event and the invariant tests from T-017/T-078.

**Acceptance**
- A signed-in patient entering `/get-started` lands on the earliest incomplete launch step.
- Skip-ahead attempts redirect to the earliest incomplete step across consent, intake, MDI handoff, billing, and dashboard routes.
- Tests prove the onboarding store contains status/pointers only, not clinical answers.
- Product pages are no longer static placeholders for the core onboarding route shell.
title: Cognito-gated onboarding journey orchestration
